design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Tycoon Simulation through its core simulation loop.

gdd_outline.combat_notes: Combat pacing should match genre tempo and readable threat language.
constraints: Signature mechanics must reinforce genre fantasy
gdd_outline.core_loop: Place infrastructure, tune economy and throughput, respond to feedback meters, and expand the map while balancing cost against growth targets.
gdd_outline.overview: Tycoon simulations task players with building and optimizing systems—parks, cities, or businesses—under budget constraints and guest or citizen satisfaction metrics.
gdd_outline.progression_notes: Follow signature mechanic dependencies across early, mid, and late phases.

mechanics.expression: Core loop of placing and connecting functional buildings or rides.
mechanics.map_notes: Core loop of placing and connecting functional buildings or rides.

mechanics.expression: Income and upkeep drive expansion decisions.
mechanics.map_notes: Income and upkeep drive expansion decisions.

mechanics.expression: Budget, staff, and space are limited build resources.
mechanics.map_notes: Budget, staff, and space are limited build resources.

mechanics.expression: New attractions or zones unlock via spending milestones.
mechanics.map_notes: New attractions or zones unlock via spending milestones.

mechanics.expression: Scenario goals reward meeting guest or citizen quotas.
mechanics.map_notes: Scenario goals reward meeting guest or citizen quotas.

narrative.core_loop: Place infrastructure, tune economy and throughput, respond to feedback meters, and expand the map while balancing cost against growth targets.
narrative.description: Tycoon simulations task players with building and optimizing systems—parks, cities, or businesses—under budget constraints and guest or citizen satisfaction metrics.

pacing.early: Teach city building simulation with low failure cost.
pacing.late: Test full signature loop mastery under peak constraints.
pacing.mid: Combine supporting mechanics and raise resource or pattern pressure.

variants.label: Hardcore Tycoon Simulation
variants.notes: Tighter economy and higher failure cost for experienced players.
